proposal.title: QUA-344 follow-up — DEV build/compile binding for SRC04_S05 (lien-inside-day-breakout)

objective: Produce executable EA artifact and metadata required for first factory P1 baseline dispatch.
acceptance_criteria: Assign ea_id for SRC04_S05 and update card header.
Build EA and publish compiled .ex5 artifact path.
Provide first-run setfile/inputs binding aligned to card defaults.
Provide dispatch fields: ea_id, ea_binary_path, target_terminal (or any), approved baseline date window.
Attach compile-PASS evidence note under docs/ops with timestamp.

pipeline_follow_on.action: Execute first one-symbol P1 baseline from prepared template and post filesystem-truth report evidence
